case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS HARDIN GEORGE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDIN GEORGE $857.63 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $899.63, PYMTS TO BE MADE AT RATE OF $60.OO ON 5/14/93 5/31/93 & 6/11/93. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $857.63 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT HARDIN GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO GEORGE HARDIN, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $395.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $156.82 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HARDIN GEORGE
